bonus_items.title: Unauthenticated /transfer endpoint
bonus_items.evidence: /transfer moves funds from JSON body fields only, with no identity or ownership check

bonus_items.title: Unauthenticated /files endpoint
bonus_items.evidence: /files/<path:name> serves files with no session or token check

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded SECRET_KEY
bonus_items.evidence: SECRET_KEY is a fixed string in source, so anyone with repo access can forge valid HMAC tokens

bonus_items.title: Transfer accepts negative amounts
bonus_items.evidence: transfer does not reject negative amount, so a negative value can increase the source balance

bonus_items.title: Unhandled ValueError in do_transfer becomes HTTP 500
bonus_items.evidence: do_transfer does not catch ValueError from banking.transfer

bonus_items.title: login does not validate JSON shape
bonus_items.evidence: login indexes body["username"] and body["password"] without checking the JSON shape

bonus_items.title: Transfer not atomic across accounts
bonus_items.evidence: debits the source and credits the destination in separate update_balance calls ... a failure after the first write can permanently lose or duplicate funds

bonus_items.title: Negative transfer amount allowed
bonus_items.evidence: transfer never requires amount to be positive, so a negative value passes the balance check

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded token signing secret
bonus_items.evidence: SECRET_KEY is a fixed string in source, so anyone with repo access can forge valid HMAC tokens

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded SECRET_KEY enables token forgery
bonus_items.evidence: SECRET_KEY is hardcoded in source, so anyone ... can forge valid HMAC tokens

bonus_items.title: Self-transfer inflates balance via stale in-memory value
bonus_items.evidence: When from_id == to_id ... using a stale in-memory balance, inflating the account by amount

bonus_items.title: Negative transfer amount reverses direction
bonus_items.evidence: transfer does not require amount > 0; a negative value passes the insufficient-funds check and reverses the debit/credit direction

bonus_items.title: Unhandled ValueError yields HTTP 500 instead of client error
bonus_items.evidence: do_transfer does not catch ValueError from banking.transfer ... surface as HTTP 500
